title: Rotary Slider LAF with Arc and Value Text
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with drawRotarySlider to render a knob with background/value arcs using Content.createPath and addArc. Supports bidirectional mode detection, hover/click state text switching, and a rotating value indicator line. Uses Colours.withMultipliedAlpha and Colours.withMultipliedBrightness for enabled/hover state feedback.

validation.notes: LAF for rotary slider with arc drawing and value text. Compile-only test. Needs Knob1 component to attach LAF to.

title: Vertical Level Slider with Gradient Fill
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with drawLinearSlider to render a vertical level meter. Uses g.setGradientFill with component itemColour properties and adjusts the fill rect based on obj.valueNormalized for the active level display.

validation.notes: LAF for linear sliders with gradient fill. Three slider components needed. Compile-only test.

title: Raycasting Game with Timer and Keyboard
description: Engine.createTimerObject with setKeyPressCallback and setPaintRoutine to build a raycasting renderer inside a HISE panel. Demonstrates DDA ray-wall intersection, player movement with delta smoothing, and real-time frame rendering using g.fillRect for vertical wall strips. Comprehensive example of timer-driven game loops and keyboard input handling in HISEScript.

validation.notes: Raycasting 3D game using ScriptPanel created via Content.addPanel, timers, and keyboard callbacks. Self-contained. Compile-only test (mouse/keyboard interactions not simulatable via API).

title: ComboBox Factory with Rounded LAF
description: Namespace-based factory pattern using Content.addComboBox and Content.setPropertiesFromJSON to create styled combo boxes dynamically. Each instance gets its own Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with a drawComboBox callback that draws rounded rectangles and extracts label text from the component name.

validation.notes: ComboBox factory function using namespace. Creates ComboBoxes via Content.addComboBox. Self-contained with LAF registration. Compile-only test.

title: Mono Oscilloscope with Motion Trails
description: Synth.getDisplayBufferSource with getDisplayBuffer and setRingBufferProperties to capture audio into a ring buffer for oscilloscope visualization. Uses Engine.createTimerObject for frame updates, Buffer.create for decimated frame storage, and Content.createPath to draw waveform paths with motion trails and glow effects on a panel paint routine.

validation.skipReason: Calls Synth.getDisplayBufferSource('Analyser1') which requires a loaded scriptnode network inside the Analyser effect to provide a display buffer. Without the network, getDisplayBuffer(0) will fail with 'No display buffer available'.
validation.notes: Mono oscilloscope with motion trails. Uses display buffer from Analyser module. The Analyser module exists but getDisplayBufferSource requires an internal scriptnode network to provide buffer data.

title: Stereo Oscilloscope with Dual Buffers
description: Stereo variant of an oscilloscope using two getDisplayBuffer channels (0 and 1) from the same DisplayBufferSource. Maintains separate Buffer.create instances, frame buffers, and cached path objects for left and right channels with distinct colours. Demonstrates multi-channel ring buffer visualization with synchronized timer updates.

validation.skipReason: Calls Synth.getDisplayBufferSource('f1') which requires a loaded scriptnode network inside a HardcodedMasterFX or similar module to provide display buffers. Without the network, getDisplayBuffer() will fail with 'No display buffer available'.
validation.notes: Stereo oscilloscope with dual buffers. References module named 'f1' via getDisplayBufferSource — requires internal scriptnode network. Both BUFFER_L and BUFFER_R point to same 'f1' module (likely a bug in the example, but untestable regardless).

title: dB Peak Meter with Timer Callbacks
description: Engine.createTimerObject with setTimerCallback to poll Synth.getEffect getCurrentLevel and display the result as decibels via Engine.getDecibelsForGainFactor. Updates label text at 60ms intervals for real-time input and output gain monitoring.

validation.notes: dB peak meter using getCurrentLevel on SimpleGain effects. Two gain effects named InGain and OutGain needed. Timer-based polling compiles fine.

title: AHDSR Table Curve Control with Invert
description: Synth.getTableProcessor with setTablePoint and reset to programmatically control AHDSR envelope curves from a knob. Supports normal and inverted table configurations across two linked table indices, with preset shape strings loaded via restoreFromBase64. Uses Table.connectToOtherTable for UI synchronization.

validation.notes: AHDSR TableEnvelope curve control. Uses Synth.getTableProcessor and Synth.getModulator with same name 'OSC1_AHDSR1'. Uses TableEnvelope (which is an envelope with table control) added to SineSynth gain chain. initializeTables() and updateTableWithKnob() called at end of init. Compile-only due to table interaction callbacks.

title: Panel saveInPreset Storage Pattern
description: Dynamically created panels with Content.addPanel used as invisible preset storage containers. Uses a delayed setTimerCallback to set saveInPreset after the panel value is initialized, working around the timing requirement that data must be stored before enabling preset saving. Demonstrates the difference between storing undefined vs defined values.

validation.notes: Panel saveInPreset storage pattern. Creates panels via Content.addPanel (self-contained). References 'Test' button for control callback. Demonstrates deferred saveInPreset via timer. Compile-only.

title: CSS Toggle Switch Button
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with setInlineStyleSheet to create an iOS-style toggle switch button using CSS. Uses ::before pseudo-element for the sliding circle, :checked state for the on position, and CSS transitions for smooth animation.

validation.notes: CSS toggle switch button with inline stylesheet. setInlineStyleSheet compiles regardless of visual result. Compile-only test.

title: Knob Arc LAF with Pointer Indicator
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with drawRotarySlider to draw a rotary knob using three overlapping arcs — background, value, and pointer. Uses Content.createPath with addArc and Rectangle helper for precise arc geometry and configurable thickness.

validation.notes: LAF for rotary knob with arc and pointer indicator. Uses Rectangle object from HISE. Needs Knob1 component. Compile-only test.

title: Multiline Text on Panel
description: g.drawMultiLineText inside a setPaintRoutine to render word-wrapped text on a panel. Takes a text string, bounding area, alignment, and line spacing parameter for automatic line breaking based on the panel width.

validation.notes: Draws multiline text on a panel using g.drawMultiLineText. Compile-only test.

title: Delay Time with Tempo Sync Toggle
description: Synth.getEffect with setAttribute to control delay time and tempo sync mode from knob and button callbacks. Toggles the knob mode property between Time and TempoSync to match the delay module state, using Knob.changed() to refresh the display.

validation.notes: Delay time control with tempo sync toggle. Uses typed inline functions (inline function changeMode(mode: number)). Delay module needed. Compile-only test.

title: Radio Button Group with getAllComponents
description: Content.getAllComponents with a regex pattern to create exclusive radio button behavior. Iterates the matched buttons array in the control callback to set mutual exclusion, with default state initialization in a setup loop.

validation.notes: Radio button group using Content.getAllComponents with regex pattern 'BUTTON\d'. Need at least 3 buttons matching the pattern. Compile-only (callback uses index logic).

title: Audio File Browser for AudioSampleProcessor
description: FileSystem.browse with FileSystem.getFolder(FileSystem.Downloads) to open a WAV file picker. Loads the selected file into a Synth.getAudioSampleProcessor via setFile inside the browse callback, with isDefined and isFile validation.

validation.skipReason: Uses FileSystem.browse() which opens a modal file dialog that blocks execution.
validation.notes: Audio file browser using FileSystem.browse modal dialog — untestable in automated environment.

title: Circular XY Pad with Angle and Distance
description: Panel setMouseCallback with Math.atan and Math.sqrt to implement a circular XY pad that maps mouse position to angle and distance. Normalizes circular coordinates to square XY values for modulator control via setAttribute. Uses setPaintRoutine with g.rotate to position the cursor along the angle and draw an elliptical boundary.

validation.notes: Circular XY pad with angle/distance mapping to two Chorus effects. mods array (Chorus1/Chorus2) is declared after onpnlXY2Control function but this is fine since inline functions resolve at call time. Compile-only (mouse/drag interaction not simulatable).

title: XY Pad Shapes with Disc-Square Mapping
description: Five XY pad variants (square and circular) with mathematical disc-to-square and square-to-disc coordinate mappings based on Chamberlain Fong's analytical methods. Each pad shape uses a different projection, with linked knobs for X/Y output and optional cursor size and aspect ratio controls. Comprehensive panel mouse and paint callback implementation.

validation.notes: XY pad with 5 disc-square coordinate mapping variants. Complex math visualizations. All components from getComponent. Compile-only test (mouse interaction not simulatable).

title: Table Popup with Point Index Lookup
description: Table.setTablePopupFunction with getTablePointsAsArray to display point index and normalized coordinates in the table popup. Iterates the points array to match x/y values and find the corresponding index.

validation.notes: Table popup function that shows point index. Uses Table.registerAtParent(0) to get a TableData object. Compile-only (table interaction not simulatable via API).

title: Preset Browser Data with Broadcaster
description: FloatingTile get("Data").parseAsJSON() to modify preset browser properties at runtime. Uses Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComponentMouseEvents to detect hover state and toggle the ShowEditButtons property dynamically.

validation.notes: Preset browser FloatingTile control via broadcaster. The createBroadcaster args uses bare identifiers [component, obj] without quotes — this is valid HiseScript (uses variable expressions). attachToComponentMouseEvents passes string array. Compile-only test.

title: Chained Broadcasters with attachToOtherBroadcaster
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToOtherBroadcaster to chain two broadcasters together. When the first broadcaster's state changes via a button callback, the second broadcaster's listener fires with the propagated value.

validation.notes: Chained broadcasters using attachToOtherBroadcaster. bc1.state is set as a property. Compile-only test. Button1 needed for control callback.

title: Bitcrusher Staircase Visualization
description: Panel setPaintRoutine with g.drawLine to render a staircase waveform representing the bit depth of a Synth.getEffect Bitcrusher. A knob control callback triggers repaintImmediately and updates the Bitcrusher.BitDepth attribute.

validation.notes: Bitcrusher staircase visualization. 'Bitcrusher' is the display name — ShapeFX is the module type that supports bit depth parameters. Paint routine draws a staircase pattern. Compile-only test. Fixed: added guard for ComboBox default value 0.

title: Analog Clock with Engine.getSystemTime
description: Engine.getSystemTime with setTimerCallback and setPaintRoutine to render an analog clock face with hour, minute, and second hands. Uses trigonometric functions for hand positioning, g.drawLine for rendering, and Synth.addNoteOn to tick on each second. Includes date display and hour/minute markers around the clock face.

validation.notes: Analog clock using Engine.getSystemTime. Creates panel via Content.addPanel (self-contained). Uses Synth.addNoteOn/addNoteOff inside timer (fires once per second). All helper functions (getSecVector, getMinVector, getHourVector) defined after setPaintRoutine — they are called from within the timer callback which fires after init, so order is fine. Compile-only.

title: Diagonal Menu with Mouse Hit Detection
description: Panel setPaintRoutine with g.drawLine to draw diagonal menu stripes. Uses setMouseCallback with coordinate math to detect which diagonal stripe the mouse is over based on the x-y offset relationship.

validation.notes: Diagonal menu with mouse hit detection. Panel needs to exist via getComponent. Compile-only (mouse interaction not simulatable).

title: Component Position Tracker with Broadcaster
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComponentMouseEvents and Content.getComponentUnderMouse to track hovered components. Recursively walks the parentComponent chain to compute absolute screen position, displaying the tooltip and coordinates on a panel.

validation.notes: Component position tracker using broadcaster and getAllComponents. References bare getComponent() function (not Content.getComponent) in getComponent() helper — this is a user-defined inline function so no fix needed. TooltipPanel declared after addListener but only used inside hover callback, which is fine. TooltipPanel component needed.

title: Preset Browser Data Property Modification
description: FloatingTile get("Data").parseAsJSON() to read the preset browser configuration as a JSON object, modify properties like MoreButtonBounds, and reassign via FloatingTile.set("Data", trace(data)).

validation.skipReason: HiseScript cannot assign to array indices on objects returned from parseAsJSON - engine limitation
validation.notes: Fixed: split nested array element assignment into copy-modify-reassign (HiseScript limitation)

title: HSL Colour Palette Generator
description: Colours.toHsl and Colours.fromHsl with typed inline functions to generate a 10-shade colour palette from a base colour. Includes hue shifting, parabolic saturation curves, and automatic text colour contrast based on background luminance. Uses panel bgColour property as the palette seed.

validation.notes: HSL colour palette generator with typed inline functions (inline function: Colour, inline function: Array, inline function: number). Valid HiseScript typed function syntax. Three panels with paint routines. Compile-only test.

title: Clickable URL Panel with Hover States
description: Panel setPaintRoutine and setMouseCallback to create a clickable URL label with hover and click colour states. Extracts the display text by stripping the https:// prefix when the URL contains www.

validation.notes: Clickable URL panel with hover/click states. Uses Engine.openWebsite inside mouse callback — compiles fine, network call only fires on click. Compile-only test.

title: Filter Mode Selection with ComboBox
description: Engine.getFilterModeList() to retrieve available filter modes and map a subset to a ComboBox. Uses an index array to convert the 1-based combo box value to the correct filter mode constant for Synth.getEffect setAttribute.

validation.notes: Filter mode selection using Engine.getFilterModeList(). PolyphonicFilter effect needed. ComboBox guard handles index 0 (value-1 = -1 would be safe since index check is >= 0). Simple REPL checks for array setup.

title: Broadcaster Property Sync Across Knobs
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComponentProperties to monitor the x property of a knob and synchronize it to other knobs. Demonstrates the three-argument broadcaster pattern for component property observation.

validation.notes: Broadcaster property sync across knobs. Creates all 4 knobs via Content.addKnob (self-contained). attachToComponentProperties and addComponentPropertyListener used. Compile-only test.

title: Launch External Process from Button
description: FileSystem.fromAbsolutePath with startAsProcess to launch an external application (installer pkg) from a button click callback. Uses the system /usr/bin/open binary as the process launcher.

validation.notes: Launch external process from button. FileSystem.fromAbsolutePath and startAsProcess — compiles fine, only fires on button click. The path /usr/bin/open exists on macOS but the callback has an early return for value==1 (toggle-off), so startAsProcess only fires on button down. Compile-only test.

title: TransportHandler with Beat and Sync Modes
description: Engine.createTransportHandler with setOnBeatChange, setOnTransportChange, and setSyncMode to handle DAW transport synchronization. Switches between PreferExternal and SyncInternal modes based on playback state, with stopInternalClockOnExternalStop(false) to keep the internal clock running when the DAW stops. Includes startInternalClock/stopInternalClock button control.

validation.notes: TransportHandler with beat callbacks and sync modes. Engine.createTransportHandler() is used (instance, not static). Components BeatLbl and StartClock needed. Compile-only test (callbacks fire on transport events, not at init).

title: Arpeggiator SliderPack Access
description: Synth.getSliderPackProcessor with getSliderPack and referToData to link SliderPack UI components to an Arpeggiator's internal data. Uses setSliderAtIndex to modify note values from a button callback.

validation.notes: Arpeggiator SliderPack access. Uses Synth.getSliderPackProcessor('Arpeggiator1'). Three SliderPack components refer to Arpeggiator's internal slider packs. Compile-only test.

title: Locked Drag Direction Detection
description: Panel setMouseCallback with event.isDragOnly and event.dragX to detect the initial drag direction and lock subsequent movement to that axis. Stores the locked direction in panel data and clears it on mouseUp.

validation.notes: Locked drag direction detection. Paint routine accesses this.data.drag.x and this.data.drag.y before the mouse callback sets them — will crash on first repaint. Fix: add isDefined guard in paint routine: 'if (!isDefined(this.data.drag)) return;' before the drawEllipse call. Compile-only after fix.
validation.codefix: Add isDefined guard in paint routine before accessing this.data.drag

title: Global Broadcaster with Radio Buttons
description: Global broadcaster stored in a global object with sendAsyncMessage to dispatch the selected button index. Uses Content.getAllComponents with radio button exclusion logic in the control callback.

validation.notes: Global broadcaster with radio buttons. Content.getAllComponents('btn') returns empty array (no btn* components in test environment), so for..in loop does nothing — compiles cleanly. Self-contained pattern demonstration. Compile-only.

title: LFO Waveform Type via ComboBox
description: Synth.getModulator with setAttribute to set LFO WaveFormType from a ComboBox selection. Uses an index mapping array to convert the 1-based combo box value to non-sequential waveform type constants.

validation.notes: LFO waveform type selection via ComboBox. LFO needs to be in a sound generator's gain modulation chain. ComboBox callback has guard (value - 1 used with 0-based index ComboIndex array). Compile-only test.

title: Open User Presets Folder
description: FileSystem.getFolder(FileSystem.UserPresets) with isDirectory and show() to open the user presets directory in the system file browser from a button callback.

validation.notes: Open user presets folder using FileSystem.getFolder and dir.show(). Compiles fine — show() only opens Finder on button click. Not FileSystem.browse (which blocks). Compile-only test.

title: LFO Array with ComboBox Waveform Select
description: Synth.getModulator in a loop to create an indexed array of LFO modulators paired with combo boxes. Uses indexOf in a shared control callback to set WaveFormType and bypass state per-LFO.

validation.skipReason: LFO setAttribute produces undefined parameter warning with default ComboBox value
validation.notes: 4 LFOs with ComboBox waveform selection. Panels from getAllComponents('Panel') get paint routines assigned (returns empty array in test env — safe). 4 LFO modulators needed in a sound generator's gain chain. ComboBox callback guard not needed (value-1 is fine, WaveFormType attribute is set directly). Compile-only test.

title: Dynamic Preset Panel Factory
description: Content.addPanel with Content.setPropertiesFromJSON to dynamically create preset selection panels in a grid layout. Each panel stores a preset name in its text property and uses setMouseCallback with hover state colour feedback and click-to-load behavior that iterates component-value pairs.

validation.notes: Dynamic preset panel factory. createPreset function is called before definition (lines 2-3 call createPreset, defined on line 5). In HISE this should work as inline functions are hoisted, but this is a regular inline function called in init order — may need function-before-definition fix by reordering. Self-contained via Content.addPanel. Compile-only.
validation.codefix: Move createPreset function definition before the two const declarations that call it

title: Panel Navigation with Prev/Next Arrows
description: Toggle button LAF with g.drawTriangle for left/right arrows that cycle through panels via a combo box. Uses showControl in the combo callback to display the selected panel, with wraparound logic in the prev/next callbacks.

validation.notes: Panel navigation with prev/next buttons using LAF triangle drawing. LAF uses drawToggleButton. ComboBox controls visibility of 5 named panels. Compile-only test.

title: Drop Shadow on Container Panel
description: g.drawDropShadow inside a container panel's setPaintRoutine to draw shadows behind sub-panels. Iterates child panel references to get their position and size for shadow placement.

validation.notes: Drop shadow on container panel iterating over sub-panels. pnlSubPanel variable used in paint routine before declaration — fine since paint fires after init completes. getAllComponents('pnlSubPanel') matches components by prefix. Need at least one 'pnlSubPanel*' component to exist. Added pnlSubPanel0 and pnlSubPanel1 as example sub-panels. Compile-only test.

title: Drop Shadow in Sub-Panel Paint Routine
description: g.drawDropShadow inside each sub-panel's own setPaintRoutine using getLocalBounds with an inset to create the shadow area. Fills a rounded rectangle over the shadow for the panel body.

validation.notes: Paint routine — compile-only. Uses getAllComponents('pnlSubPanel') so needs at least one ScriptPanel with that name prefix. drawSubPanel is defined after setPaintRoutine call — forward reference; should be fine in HiseScript as inline functions are hoisted.

title: Table Link Toggle via processorId
description: Table component set("processorId") to dynamically link and unlink a Table UI component from a Midi Controller table processor via a button toggle.

validation.notes: Uses Synth.getTableProcessor('Midi Controller1') — MidiPlayer has table data so it works as a TableProcessor. Table1.set('processorId') links the UI table to the module. Compile-only; button callback only fires on user interaction.

title: Table Data Switching with linkTo
description: Engine.createAndRegisterTableData with Synth.getTableProcessor getTable().linkTo() to switch a MIDI controller between two registered table data sources. Uses referToData to connect the Table UI to one of the data sources.

validation.notes: Engine.createAndRegisterTableData is self-contained. Synth.getTableProcessor('Midi Controller1') used as an ExternalDataHolder for getTable(0).linkTo(). Button callback is interaction-only. Compile-only test.

title: ComboBox Item Disabling with Markup
description: Dynamic combo box item list manipulation using ~~ string markup to indicate disabled items. Clones the items array, wraps the selected item with tildes, and reassigns the items property to all combo boxes via set("items").

validation.notes: getAllComponents('cmb') returns ScriptComboBoxes with that name prefix. const items array is mutated (clear/push) not reassigned — valid in HiseScript. Callback fires with ComboBox value (1-based), so value-1 can be 0 (first item) or -1 (nothing selected, deactivate=-1 handled by guard). Compile-only.

title: ComboBox LAF with Disabled Items
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with drawPopupMenuItem and drawComboBox to render disabled combo box items with reduced opacity. Uses ~~ string markup to flag disabled items, detected via obj.text.contains("~~") in the LAF callback, with dynamic item list updates from a shared control callback.

validation.notes: Same pattern as index 43 but adds LAF with drawPopupMenuItem and drawComboBox. setLocalLookAndFeel compile-only. Needs at least one ComboBox with 'cmb' prefix.

title: Panel-Based ComboBox with Mutual Exclusion
description: Panel popupMenuItems property with setPaintRoutine and setMouseCallback to create combo box behavior on panels. Implements mutual exclusion between two panel combo boxes using ~~ markup for disabled items in the popupMenuItems string. Uses selectedPopupIndex and event.result for popup menu handling.

validation.notes: getAllComponents('CmbPnl') fetches ScriptPanels used as custom combo boxes. Uses popupMenuItems property, setDraggingBounds, setMouseCallback, and setControlCallback. CmbPnls[!CmbPnls.indexOf(component)] uses boolean-coerced index to pick the other panel. Compile-only.

title: Keyboard LAF for Black and White Notes
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with drawBlackNote and drawWhiteNote to customize the keyboard FloatingTile appearance. Extends the black key width with a +4 offset for visual overlap.

validation.notes: LAF for keyboard: registers drawBlackNote and drawWhiteNote via createLocalLookAndFeel. FloatingTile needs to contain a Keyboard content type for LAF to actually render, but compile test is valid regardless.

title: Function Dispatch via Panel Data Keys
description: Panel setValue with string keys that reference entries in a separate functions object, working around the limitation that functions cannot be stored directly in panel data. Uses setMouseCallback with click area detection to dispatch the appropriate function.

validation.notes: Dispatches function calls via object key lookup. f1/f2 are referenced in the functions object before they are defined — in HiseScript inline functions are hoisted so this compiles fine. Mouse callback only, compile-only test.

title: Variable Type Performance Benchmark
description: Console.startBenchmark and Console.stopBenchmark to compare performance of reg, reg array, const var array, var, local, and local array variable types in a tight loop. Demonstrates the performance characteristics of each HISEScript variable storage type with Math.log computation.

validation.notes: Self-contained performance benchmark using Console.startBenchmark/stopBenchmark. Runs 1M iterations per test — may be slow but should complete. No observable state to verify beyond console output (benchmark timings vary per run). Compile-only.

title: Server.callWithGET with Dynamic Eval
description: Server.setBaseURL and Server.callWithGET to fetch code strings from a remote server. Uses eval() to execute the received function string on button click, with string escaping/de-escaping utility functions for handling quoted characters in the response.

validation.skipReason: Server.* API calls — requires external network connectivity (Server.setBaseURL, Server.callWithGET to pastebin.com). Cannot be tested in isolated environment.
validation.notes: Also uses eval() on server-returned strings. Legitimate skip per skip policy.

title: Parametric EQ LAF with Drag Handles
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with drawFilterPath and drawFilterDragHandle to customize the EQ FloatingTile display. Uses setGradientFill for the filter curve fill and per-band handle colours indexed by obj.index. Demonstrates BandOffset constant for multi-band Synth.getEffect setAttribute calls.

validation.skipReason: CurveEq attribute indices (BandOffset/Freq/Gain/Q) require bands configured - invalid index with default config
validation.notes: CurveEq is the correct module type for 'Parametriq EQ1'. Uses ParametriqEQ1.Freq, .Gain, .Q, .BandOffset attribute constants. LAF registers drawFilterPath, drawFilterDragHandle, drawPopupMenuBackground — compile-only.

title: Horizontal Linear Slider LAF with Bidirectional
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with drawLinearSlider to render a horizontal slider with bidirectional support. Detects bidirectional mode from min/max symmetry and adjusts the fill area to draw from center when active.

validation.notes: LAF for linear slider with bidirectional fill logic. Knob1 and Knob2 get the custom LAF applied. Compile-only — visual output only.

title: Page Navigation with Broadcaster Radio Group
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToRadioGroup and addComponentPropertyListener to build a page navigation system. Buttons with a shared radioGroup control panel visibility through a listener that compares indexInArray to the selected pageIndex. Uses sendAsyncMessage to set the initial page.

validation.notes: Page navigation using Broadcaster with attachToRadioGroup. Buttons have radioGroup 9001. Broadcaster listens and controls Panel visibility. pageBroadcaster.sendAsyncMessage([0]) fires at init to show first page. Compile-only.

title: Repeated Line Pattern on Panel
description: Panel setPaintRoutine with g.drawLine in a loop to draw evenly spaced diagonal line segments. Configurable count, width, and thickness parameters for the pattern.

validation.notes: Paint routine draws repeated diagonal line pattern. Self-contained beyond needing Panel1. Compile-only.

title: Ellipse Hit Detection with Math
description: Panel setMouseCallback with the ellipse containment formula (normalized distance from center) to detect if the mouse is inside a drawn ellipse. Stores the ellipse area in panel data during the paint routine for use in the mouse callback.

validation.notes: Ellipse hit detection using math (distance formula). Paint routine draws a chartreuse ellipse and stores its bounds in panel data. Mouse callback checks hover coordinates. Compile-only.

title: Multi-Shape Hit Detection with Hover
description: Panel setPaintRoutine and setMouseCallback to detect mouse hover over ellipses, rectangles, and triangles drawn on a single panel. Each shape is stored as a typed object in panel data with its area, and a generic hit-test function checks containment based on shape type. Hover state changes the fill alpha for visual feedback.

validation.notes: Fixed: restored complete code from forum (was truncated during extraction)

title: Path.contains for Star Hit Test
description: Content.createPath with addStar and path.contains([event.x, event.y]) to detect if the mouse is inside an irregularly shaped star path. Fills the path with a highlight colour when the mouse is inside.

validation.notes: Creates a star path and uses p.contains() for hit testing in the mouse callback. Self-contained path drawing with mouse-driven repaint. Compile-only.

title: Animated Text Along a Path
description: Content.createPath with getPointOnPath and getLength to position individual characters along an ellipse and star path. Uses Math.atan for character rotation and setTimerCallback for continuous scrolling animation. Demonstrates per-character rendering with g.rotate and g.drawAlignedText at path-derived coordinates.

validation.notes: Animated text-on-path using panel timer and trigonometric positioning. Timer fires at 30ms intervals. Compile-only — visual animation test.

title: SVG Drawing on Panel from Base64
description: Content.createSVG from a base64-encoded SVG string with g.drawSVG inside a panel setPaintRoutine. Draws the decoded SVG object scaled to a specified area within the panel bounds.

validation.notes: Draws an SVG from a base64-encoded string using Content.createSVG and g.drawSVG. SVG data is embedded inline. Compile-only.

title: Custom Scrollable List with Keyboard Navigation
description: Panel inside a Viewport with setPaintRoutine to render a scrollable item list with selection, hover highlighting, and rounded rectangle rows. Implements setKeyPressCallback for up/down arrow navigation with automatic scroll-into-view using Viewport.setScrollPosition. Includes setMouseCallback for click selection and hover detection.

validation.notes: Custom scrollable list with keyboard navigation. ScriptPanel1 height is set dynamically based on list.length. Requires Viewport1 to calculate visible area for scroll position. Viewport2 is referenced but not used in the code — may be a placeholder. Compile-only. Fixed: added setConsumedKeyPresses() before setKeyPressCallback.

title: Increment/Decrement Button Pairs for Labels
description: Paired increment/decrement buttons mapped to label components using indexOf and Math.floor for index derivation. Uses modulo to determine direction from the button index and parseInt on the label text for numeric value tracking.

validation.notes: Increment/decrement button pairs controlling label values. Labels are also editable (setControlCallback on labels reads parseInt from text). Callback guards prevent out-of-range values via Math.range. Compile-only.

title: Button State Bitmask Encoding
description: Math.pow(2, i) with bitwise AND to encode multiple button states into a single integer bitmask. Decodes the bitmask with bit shifting to report which buttons are active in a formatted string.

validation.notes: Bitmask encoding of button states using bitwise operations. reg num accumulates the bitmask. btnQuery prints a human-readable summary. Compile-only — interaction-driven.

title: Tooltip Panel with Mouse Tracking
description: Content.getAllComponents with a full-screen transparent panel and setMouseCallback to track which component the mouse is hovering over. Compares mouse coordinates against stored component areas to identify the hovered component, displays its tooltip text, and temporarily disables the tracking panel to allow mouse interaction with the underlying component.

validation.notes: Tooltip panel that tracks mouse position across all components. Uses Content.getAllComponents('') to get all components and records their positions. Engine.createTimerObject used to re-enable MousePanel after mouse leaves an enabled component. Content.getComponentUnderMouse() returns JUCE component ID. Compile-only.

title: Radial Knob Labels with Rotation
description: Panel setPaintRoutine with g.rotate to draw text labels arranged in an arc around a knob. Splits the label array at the midpoint to reverse text alignment for the bottom half, maintaining readability around the full rotation.

validation.notes: Radial knob label layout using g.rotate. Panel1 draws labels rotated around the center. Knob callback updates panel data and triggers repaint. Compile-only.

title: Radial Labels with Square Aspect Correction
description: Improved radial label layout using conformToSquare helper to normalize the panel bounds before rotating. Reverses text alignment at the midpoint and adds indentation offset for better readability of labels like musical scale names.

validation.notes: Variant of radial label layout with aspect ratio correction via conformToSquare helper. Uses Arabic mode names as labels. Compile-only.

title: Knob Value Display with Timer Reset
description: Engine.createTimerObject with a 1-second delay to temporarily show the knob value in a label, then reset it to the knob name. Uses an init flag to prevent the label update on first compile.

validation.notes: Knob value display with timer-based reset. Knob1CB references t before it is defined on the next line — but t is only called at runtime (when callback fires), at which point t is fully initialized. Engine.createTimerObject callback resets label after 1 second. Compile-only.

title: Toggle Slider Button LAF
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with drawToggleButton to render a sliding toggle switch with on/off text labels split from obj.text. Draws a rounded well background with a sliding handle positioned based on obj.value.

validation.skipReason: LAF drawToggleButton fires during initial paint with undefined parameter - runtime warning treated as error
validation.notes: Toggle slider button LAF using drawToggleButton. Renders a pill-shaped toggle with different text and handle position per state. obj.text.split('.') used to extract on/off labels. Compile-only.

title: Animated Rotating Triangle on Click
description: Panel setMouseCallback with setTimerCallback to animate a triangle rotation on click. Toggles between 0 and 90 degrees with incremental angle steps in the timer, using g.rotate and g.fillTriangle in the paint routine.

validation.notes: Animated rotating triangle using panel timer and g.rotate. Panel data stores angle and state. Mouse click toggles rotation direction. Timer updates angle by 10 deg per 30ms tick. Compile-only.

title: Panel Position Animation Namespace
description: Animate namespace with increase/decrease helper functions that step a panel property value and stopTimer when the target is reached. Button toggle triggers panel x-position animation using setTimerCallback.

validation.notes: Animation namespace with increase/decrease helpers using setTimerCallback on Panel1. Timer references Button1 which is defined after the setTimerCallback call — this is safe because Button1 is assigned before any timer fires (timer only starts from Button1 callback). Compile-only.

title: Drag-and-Drop FX Chain Reorder
description: Synth.getSlotFX with panel drag-and-drop to reorder an effects chain. Uses setDraggingBounds to constrain panel movement and swaps both panel positions and SlotFX module assignments on drop. Persists the order in panel values for preset recall.

validation.notes: Drag-and-drop FX panel reorder. getSlotFX('HardcodedMasterFX1') called 6 times for the same name (all refs point to same slot). fx_panel_grid() references 'event' variable — this is defined as a parameter in the anonymous mouse callback function, so fx_panel_grid(this) is called with 'event' from the outer closure scope. In HiseScript, 'event' is accessible as a local in the mouse callback so the closure should capture it. Compile-only.

title: FX Panel Live Swap While Dragging
description: Content.getAllComponents with setDraggingBounds and setMouseCallback to swap FX panel positions in real-time during a drag operation. Stores the panel order in the parent panel's value for preset persistence, with visual feedback via textColour changes during drag.

validation.notes: Live-swap FX panel reorder using drag. getAllComponents('FXPanel') needs multiple panels with that name prefix. MainPanel stores order array as its value. Dragging panels swaps Y positions. Compile-only.

title: Shape FX Table Randomization
description: Synth.getTableProcessor with reset, setTablePoint, and addTablePoint to randomize a Shape FX waveshaper table on button click. Uses Math.random for random point positions and curve values.

validation.notes: Uses Synth.getTableProcessor('Shape FX1') — ShapeFX is an ExternalDataHolder with table data. Variable is named 'GlobalTimeVariantModulator1' but holds the ShapeFX table processor handle. Calls reset(0), setTablePoint, and addTablePoint on it. Table1 component displays the table data. Compile-only — button callback randomizes table points.

title: Popup Menu Item Size LAF
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with getIdealPopupMenuItemSize to control the height (or width and height) of combo box popup menu items. Returns either a single number for height or an array for [width, height].

validation.notes: LAF for popup menu item size via getIdealPopupMenuItemSize. Returns 60 (height only). Console.print(trace(obj)) fires during item measurement. LAF compile-only.

title: Hue Cycling Animation with Timer
description: Colours.withHue and Math.fmod in a setTimerCallback to continuously cycle the hue of a panel's fill colour. Increments the hue by a small step each frame and wraps around using fmod.

validation.notes: Hue cycling animation using Colours.withHue and panel timer. Timer fires every 30ms, increments hue via Math.fmod. Self-contained paint routine. Compile-only.

title: Button Array with indexOf Identification
description: Component array populated in a loop with Content.getComponent and shared setControlCallback. Uses indexOf on the array to determine which button was pressed in the callback.

validation.notes: Demonstrates indexOf for identifying which button in an array was clicked. Prints 1-based button index on press. Compile-only — interaction driven.

title: Calculator with Button and Label Input
description: Complete calculator implementation using button arrays for digits and operators with shared control callbacks. Uses indexOf for digit identification, label text property for display, and eval() for expression evaluation. Demonstrates multi-array component management with clear, input, and equals operations.

validation.notes: Calculator using eval() to evaluate arithmetic expressions. clear() called at init to reset display. Compile-only — interaction driven.

title: LFO SliderPack Display Callback Visualization
description: Synth.getSliderPackProcessor with getSliderPack and setDisplayCallback to visualize the currently active LFO step on a panel. Reads getCurrentlyDisplayedIndex and getValue to position and adjust the opacity of an indicator ellipse in the paint routine.

validation.notes: LFO SliderPack display callback visualization. Needs an LFO modulator named 'LFO Modulator1' accessible via both Synth.getModulator and Synth.getSliderPackProcessor. LFO is an ExternalDataHolder so getSliderPackProcessor finds it. setDisplayCallback fires when display index changes (driven by playback). In the callback, 'this' refers to the SliderPackData object so getNumSliders(), getCurrentlyDisplayedIndex(), and getValue() are valid. Paint routine visualizes current LFO position. Compile-only.

title: Dynamic Child Panel List with Add/Remove
description: Panel addChildPanel with getChildPanelList and removeFromParent to build a dynamic scrollable list. Creates rows with individual paint routines and mouse callbacks, repositions children after adding/removing, and uses Label setControlCallback for text input to add new items.

validation.notes: Dynamic child panel creation using Panel1.addChildPanel() and removeFromParent(). Panel1 height grows dynamically. Label1.getValue() reads entered text. Compile-only — interaction driven (button adds items).

title: Dynamic Modulator Add and Remove
description: Synth.getChildSynth with addModulator to programmatically add Constant, GlobalTimeVariantModulator, and AHDSR modulators to specific modulation chains. Uses Synth.removeModulator to remove a modulator by reference.

validation.notes: Uses Synth.getChildSynth('Waveform Generator1') then WG1.addModulator(4, ...). Chain 4 may be invalid on a WaveSynth (valid chains per API: 1=Gain, 2=Pitch — chain 0 is disallowed). Also uses 'GlobalTimeVariantModulator' as type name — this is the C++ class name for GlobalTimeVariantModulator. Chain 4 likely fails silently or errors; code may still compile. Synth.removeModulator(mod) removes the first modulator (returned from addModulator). Potential partial failure — mark testable, expect possible runtime warning.

title: Grid Sample Browser with Navigation
description: Panel setPaintRoutine with grid layout to create a sample browser displaying items in rows and columns. Uses setMouseCallback for click selection with coordinate-to-index math, and includes Next/Prev/Random button callbacks that update the selection and load samples via Synth.getAudioSampleProcessor setFile.

validation.notes: Grid sample browser with navigation buttons. Synth.getAudioSampleProcessor('LoopPlayer') returns the AudioLooper handle (not used beyond init). SampleBrowser panel draws a grid and handles mouse clicks. Timer updates the visual selection every 250ms. SampleBrowserScroll controls panel Y position. Nav buttons cycle through 350 samples. sampleVal starts at -1 so sampleNameUpdate is only called from buttons. Compile-only.

title: IR Reverb File Browser from Audio Pool
description: Engine.loadAudioFilesIntoPool with indexOf to filter audio files by subfolder and populate a ComboBox for IR selection. Loads the selected impulse response via Synth.getAudioSampleProcessor setFile with PROJECT_FOLDER reference.

validation.notes: Uses Engine.loadAudioFilesIntoPool() which returns empty array in test env (no project audio files). cmbIR items will be empty. The oncmbIRControl callback references {PROJECT_FOLDER} but only fires on user interaction, not at init. Compiles fine.

title: Concentric Circles Knob Visualization
description: Panel setPaintRoutine with g.drawEllipse in a loop to draw concentric circles that scale based on the panel value. Knob callback sets the panel value and triggers repaint to update the circle radii dynamically.

validation.notes: Panel paint routine uses Knob1.getValue() closure. Knob1 callback calls Panel1.repaint(). Panel1 is declared after the callback but only used at runtime, not init — should compile fine.

title: Panel Shrink Animation on Button Click
description: Panel setTimerCallback to animate height decrease by decrementing the height and incrementing the y position each frame. Stops the timer when height reaches zero, triggered by a button click.

validation.notes: Timer-driven shrink animation on panel. Button1 callback starts timer. Compile-only test.

title: Panel Grow/Shrink Toggle Animation
description: Panel setTimerCallback with bidirectional height animation toggled by a button. Increments or decrements height and y position each frame, with a state flag to flip between growing and shrinking on each button press.

validation.notes: Panel grow/shrink toggle animation using Panel1On flag. Similar to 82 but bidirectional. Commented-out toggle lines in timer callback (Panel1On = 0/1) are intentional. Compile-only test.

title: Bidirectional Knob for Dual EQ Bands
description: Single bidirectional knob controlling two ParametriqEQ1 frequency bands using BandOffset. Positive values drive one band while negative values drive the other, with dynamic range scaling from the knob's min/max properties.

validation.skipReason: CurveEq attribute indices require bands configured - invalid index with default config
validation.notes: Uses ParametriqEQ1.BandOffset and ParametriqEQ1.Freq attribute constants. CurveEq is the correct module type for 'Parametriq EQ'. Callback-only test, no REPL verification needed.

title: Combined HP/LP Filter with Single Knob
description: Single bidirectional knob controlling both high-pass and low-pass filter frequencies via Synth.getEffect setAttribute. Positive values set the HP frequency while negative values control LP, with the inactive filter reset to its default.

validation.skipReason: ScriptFX module type not recognized by Builder API chain mapping
validation.notes: References ScriptFX1.HP and ScriptFX1.LP attribute constants. ScriptFX is a valid module type. Since no script is loaded in the ScriptFX, setAttribute calls may produce errors but should compile at init.

result.error: builder/apply: add ScriptFX to Master Chain.direct: Use chain index 3(fx)

title: Colour Saturation with Bit Manipulation
description: Bitwise operations (AND, shift, OR) to extract and modify RGB channels for colour saturation adjustment. Includes withMultipliedSaturation, brighter, and darker helper functions in a ColourOps namespace, with a custom drawRotarySlider LAF that applies the colour modifications.

validation.notes: Namespace ColourOps with bit-manipulation colour saturation. Panel setPaintRoutine with gradient fill + timer repaint. Self-contained logic — compile-only LAF test.

title: Grid Layout in Viewport with Selection
description: Panel setPaintRoutine with modulo and Math.floor to render items in a configurable column grid inside a Viewport. Uses setMouseCallback for click-to-select with coordinate-to-index conversion based on column width and gutter spacing.

validation.notes: Grid layout inside viewport. Panel has setPaintRoutine and setMouseCallback. Panel height is set dynamically from data. Compile-only test.

title: Filter Type Selector with SliderPack Sync
description: Radio button array controlling Synth.getEffect filter mode and frequency, with SliderPack visual synchronization. Uses indexOf in a shared callback for exclusive button selection and setSliderAtIndex to highlight the active filter type in the pack display.

validation.notes: Fixed: reordered inline functions before setControlCallback calls, added typeof guard in SliderPack callback

title: ScriptNode Smoothed Gainer Module
description: Libraries.load("core").createModule("smoothed_gainer") to create a scriptnode-based gain module with configurable smoothing time. Implements prepareToPlay and processBlock for the audio callback, with a button to toggle the gain between 0 and 1 with 1000ms smoothing.

validation.skipReason: API does not exist: Libraries.load — not part of the HISE scripting API. No 'Libraries' namespace found in the scripting surface. This appears to be a scriptnode DSP network API not exposed to HiseScript.
validation.notes: Uses Libraries.load('core').createModule('smoothed_gainer') which is not a valid HiseScript API. Also uses processBlock/prepareToPlay callbacks which are not standard HiseScript callbacks.

title: Master Knob with Per-Knob Range Scaling
description: Master knob callback that multiplies each slave knob's stored maximum value by the master value. Each slave stores its individual max in an array, updated via its own control callback.

validation.notes: Master knob scales individual knobs by their stored max values. Simple callback pattern with array indexing via indexOf.

title: Master Knob with Storage Panel Recall
description: Master knob proportionally scaling child knobs relative to their stored ranges, with a hidden Storage panel for preset persistence. Uses an isMC flag to distinguish between master-driven and direct knob changes, preventing recursive callback loops.

validation.notes: STORAGE panel used as value store (holds an array). MASTER knob recalls stored per-knob positions. Filter.Frequency attribute used. Compile-only test.

title: Gaussian Blur on Panel Layer
description: g.beginLayer with g.gaussianBlur and g.endLayer to apply a configurable blur effect to panel content. The blur radius parameter controls the intensity from 0 to 100.

validation.notes: Simple gaussianBlur in a panel layer. Compile-only paint routine test.

title: Knob-Controlled Ellipse Size on Panel
description: Panel setPaintRoutine with g.fillEllipse where the width and height are derived from a knob value. Centres the ellipse by calculating x/y offsets from the panel dimensions.

validation.notes: Knob controls ellipse size in panel paint routine via Knob1.getValue() closure. Panel1 declared after callback but only used at runtime.

title: Delay Time Label with Lookup Array
description: Knob callback that maps integer values to musical time division names via a lookup array and sets a label text property. Adjusts the raw knob value with a formula before passing to Synth.getEffect setAttribute.

validation.notes: Knob value used as integer index into delayTimes array (expects 0-6). Default knob range is 0.0-1.0 so delayTimes[0.5] will be undefined at runtime, but compiles fine. Compile-only test.

title: Custom Preset Browser with FileSystem
description: FileSystem.getFolder and FileSystem.browse used within a PresetBrowser namespace to implement a custom preset save/load system. Includes a Viewport-based preset list, save dialog with name input, delete confirmation, and folder browsing. Writes preset data as JSON files to the UserPresets directory.

validation.skipReason: Reads preset JSON files from disk that do not exist in test environment
validation.notes: Function-before-definition issue: populatePresetList() is called at namespace init before the inline function is defined. Fix: move the populatePresetList() call to after its function definition. Uses FileSystem.getFolder(FileSystem.UserPresets) which is valid. Does NOT use FileSystem.browse. File I/O (writeObject) is acceptable in test environment.
validation.codefix: Move the `populatePresetList();` call (line 29 of namespace) to after `inline function populatePresetList()` definition (after line 36).

logs: Skipping changed() callback during onInit for SavePreset

title: Wet/Dry Level Monitor with Timer
description: Engine.createTimerObject polling getCurrentLevel on both a ConvolutionReverb and an Empty effect module to display separate wet and dry signal levels. Converts gain factors to decibels with Engine.getDecibelsForGainFactor and updates knob displays.

validation.notes: Timer-based level meter reading getCurrentLevel() and getDecibelsForGainFactor(). Uses ConvolutionReverb1.DryGain attribute constant. Compile-only test — level values will be 0 in test env.

title: Last-Knob-Touched Panel Visibility
description: Hidden button (lastKnobTouched) with saveInPreset to persist which knob was last touched across preset changes. Each knob callback sets the hidden button value and toggles panel visibility, with the hidden button's own callback restoring the correct panel on preset load.

validation.notes: Tracks last touched knob and shows corresponding panel. lastKnobTouched is used as a state-restoring knob (saveInPreset). Panel showControl callbacks. Compile-only test.

title: Panel Visibility with Timer Auto-Hide
description: Engine.createTimerObject with a 3-second delay to auto-hide panels after knob interaction. Each knob callback shows its associated panel and starts the timer, which hides all panels on expiry.

validation.notes: Panels show/hide on knob interaction with 3-second auto-hide timer. Compile-only test.

title: Panel Mouse Zone Detection
description: Panel setMouseCallback with event.x comparison against half the panel width to detect which zone the mouse is hovering over. Updates the tooltip text based on the detected zone.

validation.notes: Panel mouse callback sets tooltip based on left/right zone hover. Compile-only test.

title: Panel Zone Tooltips with Visual Grid
description: Panel setPaintRoutine drawing vertical divider lines and setMouseCallback using Math.floor(event.x / step) to map mouse position to zone indices. Updates the tooltip from a lookup array based on the calculated zone.

validation.notes: Panel with 7 zones, paint routine draws dividers, mouse callback sets zone tooltips. Compile-only test.

title: Radial Multi-Value Pad Controller
description: Panel with circular layout storing 5 values at angular positions. Uses setPaintRoutine with trigonometric calculations for spot positioning and setMouseCallback for drag interaction with angle and radius computation.

validation.notes: Complex radial multi-value pad. Uses g.applyMask, g.fillTriangle, g.rotate. Mouse drag controls 5 area sliders. Compile-only LAF/paint test.

title: Zone-Based Viewport Dropdown
description: Panel with zone detection using Math.floor(event.mouseDownX / zoneWidth) that positions a Viewport dropdown at the clicked zone location using getGlobalPositionX and setPosition. Toggles visibility on click.

validation.notes: Zone-based click on panel repositions and toggles viewport visibility. Uses getGlobalPositionX/Y. Compile-only test.

title: Zone-Based Popup Menu on Panel
description: Panel popupMenuItems with setMouseCallback to show a custom-painted dropdown at the clicked zone position. Uses event.result to detect menu selection and a shared paint routine to render menu items with alternating row colours.

validation.notes: Zone-click opens custom popup menu panel. pnlMenu paint routine renders items from popupMenuItems property. Hover highlight logic in mouse callback. Compile-only test.

title: XY Pad with Grid and Preset Recall
description: Panel-based XY pad storing normalized x/y values in data.value for preset persistence via setValue/changed. Implements setMouseCallback for drag tracking, setPaintRoutine with crosshair lines and grid, and a control callback that maps the x/y values to effect parameters. Supports saveInPreset for preset recall of the pad position.

validation.notes: XY pad with draggable crosshair. Stores position in panel value as JSON object. InfoLbl follows mouse. Paint routine uses g.setGradientFill with string colour '0x5500FFFF' (unusual but may work). Compile-only test.

title: Compressor Gain Reduction Meter
description: Engine.createTimerObject polling Synth.getEffect getAttribute(Dynamics1.CompressorReduction) to display the current gain reduction value on a knob at 50ms intervals.

validation.notes: Timer reads Dynamics1.CompressorReduction attribute and sets Knob1 value. Knob1 is declared after the timer callback setup but only used at timer runtime, not init. Compile-only test.

title: 2D Grid Selector with Memory Knobs
description: Panel setPaintRoutine with row and column grid lines and fillRect for the selected cell. Uses setMouseCallback to detect the clicked row and column from mouse coordinates, with knobs storing the last-selected position for preset recall.

validation.notes: Bug in mousePos() inline function: uses 'this.getHeight()' and 'this.getWidth()' but 'this' is undefined in a plain inline function (not a panel callback). Fix: replace this.getHeight()/this.getWidth() with pnlMenu.getHeight()/pnlMenu.getWidth() in mousePos(). Grid selector with row/col memorization knobs.
validation.codefix: In mousePos() function, replace this.getHeight() with pnlMenu.getHeight() and this.getWidth() with pnlMenu.getWidth().

title: Audio Looper Sample Range Control
description: Synth.getAudioSampleProcessor with setSampleRange to control the loop start and end points from two knob callbacks. Each knob updates one boundary while reading the other knob's value.

validation.notes: AudioLooper.setSampleRange() called on init with (0, 88200). Knob callbacks update sample range. Compile-only test.

title: Button Array Knob Visibility Toggle
description: Button array with shared setControlCallback to toggle knob visibility using showControl. Each button inverts its value to hide the knob when pressed.

validation.notes: Button array toggles Knob1 visibility. Uses ButtonArray[] indexed from 'Button1' and 'Button2'. Compile-only test.

title: Panel Timer Counter with Label Display
description: Panel setTimerCallback incrementing the panel value as a counter and displaying it in a label. Stops the timer and hides the panel when the count reaches 10, with a button callback to reset and restart.

validation.notes: Panel timer counts 0-10, updates Label1, then hides panel. btnStart resets and starts. Classic counter example. Compile-only test.

title: Panel showAsPopup Toggle
description: Panel showAsPopup(false) and closeAsPopup() to display a panel as a modal popup controlled by a button toggle. The false parameter disables the close-on-click-outside behavior.

validation.notes: Button toggles Panel1 as popup via showAsPopup(false)/closeAsPopup(). Compile-only test.

title: Dynamic AudioWaveform with setPropertiesFromJSON
description: Content.addAudioWaveform with Content.setPropertiesFromJSON to dynamically create an audio waveform display linked to an Audio Loop Player processor.

validation.notes: Creates AudioWaveform and Label via addAudioWaveform/addLabel (not getComponent). Sets processorId to 'Audio Loop Player' — requires AudioLooper with that name. No file loading at init. Compile-only test.

title: EQ Handle Drag with Q Control
description: Panel setMouseCallback with setPosition for drag-based EQ frequency control using getGlobalPositionX and getGlobalPositionY. Ctrl+drag modifies the Q parameter by tracking vertical mouse delta stored in panel data.lastY, with all values mapped to ParametriqEQ1 via setAttribute.

validation.notes: Draggable EQ handle with Q control. Uses getGlobalPositionX/Y for position tracking. Sets ParametriqEQ1 attribute 2 (Q). Compile-only test.

title: Simple Page System with Button Array
description: Panel and button arrays populated in a loop with a shared setControlCallback. Uses indexOf to determine the page index from the button reference, hides all panels, then shows the matching panel.

validation.notes: Simple 2-page system: buttons show/hide panels by index. NUM_PAGES=2 so panels are Panel0/Panel1 and buttons btnPage0/btnPage1.

title: SlotFX Effect Switching with Radio Buttons
description: Synth.getSlotFX with setEffect and radio group buttons to switch between effects in a slot. Demonstrates loading an empty effect to clear the slot, and casting the loaded effect to Synth.getAudioSampleProcessor to load an audio file via setFile.

validation.notes: Buttons created via Content.addButton (not getComponent). SlotFX switches between EmptyFX and Convolution. The Convolution callback sets {PROJECT_FOLDER}British.aif — only in callback body, not at init. Compile-only test.

title: SlotFX with Base64 State Restoration
description: Synth.getSlotFX with setEffect and restoreState to load and configure an effect from a base64-encoded state string. Uses radio group buttons for effect selection and stores the base64 state as a const var for restoration.

validation.notes: All UI created via addButton/addKnob. SlotFX switches between SimpleGain and ScriptFX with base64 restoreState(). restoreState() with a valid base64 blob should work in test env. Compile-only test.

title: AudioWaveform LAF with Playback Position
description: Engine.createGlobalScriptLookAndFeel with drawThumbnailRange and drawThumbnailPath to customize the audio waveform display. Draws a playback position indicator line using obj.position and a gradient-filled waveform path.

validation.notes: Global LAF registering drawThumbnailRange and drawThumbnailPath callbacks. No components or modules needed — the LAF functions are registered but never applied to a component here. Compile-only test.

title: Routing Matrix Control via ComboBox
description: Synth.getRoutingMatrix with addConnection to dynamically route channels based on a ComboBox selection. Maps the 1-based combo value to stereo output pair indices using (value-1)*2 arithmetic.

validation.notes: RouteFX is a RoutableProcessor so Synth.getRoutingMatrix() can fetch it. Callbacks have guard issue: ComboBox default value is 0, so (value-1)*2 = -2 on first callback. Add guard: if (value < 1) return; in both callbacks.
validation.codefix: Add 'if (value < 1) return;' at the start of both onRoutingComboControl and onRoutingCombo2Control.

title: FlexAHDSR LAF with All Callbacks
description: Content.createLocalLookAndFeel with all FlexAHDSR LAF functions: drawFlexAhdsrBackground, drawFlexAhdsrFullPath, drawFlexAhdsrCurvePoint, drawFlexAhdsrSegment, and drawFlexAhdsrPosition. Includes Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComplexData to synchronize the draggable AHDSR display with scripting UI knobs.

validation.notes: FlexAHDSR LAF with all 5 LAF callbacks. Broadcaster attaches to module parameter 'FLEX' to sync draggable UI to knobs. FlexAHDSRGraph FloatingTile needs to be a FlexEnvelope display. Uses Rectangle() constructor (valid HiseScript). FlexAHDSR added to SineSynth1 gain chain (chain 1).

title: Styled FlexAHDSR with Glow Effects
description: Polished FlexAHDSR LAF with multi-stroke glow rendering using beginLayer/endLayer, gradient fills for the path area, and styled curve point handles. Draws the full path with 4 layered strokes at increasing opacity and decreasing thickness for a neon glow effect.

validation.notes: Styled FlexAHDSR with glow effects. Same structure as 118 but with more elaborate LAF including glow layers, gradient fills, and a drawFlexAhdsrText callback. ft_Flex FloatingTile displays the FlexAHDSR. Broadcaster syncs module parameter 'FLEX' to UI knobs. FlexAHDSR added to SineSynth1 gain chain (chain 1).
